name: Would You Rather
description: Faced with two terrible choices, which one will you choose? A game of difficult decisions.

prompts.optionA: Always have to say everything on your mind
Have the ability to fly but only at 5 mph
prompts.optionB: Be invisible but only when your eyes are closed

prompts.optionA: Have a rewind button for your life
prompts.optionB: Have a pause button for your life
